title: L&D Domain Lead — Applied Research
assigned_operational_agents: Research agents, technical research leads, evaluation agents, spike agents across all products
mission: Continuously improve every research agent's capability in research methodology, technology evaluation, proof-of-concept design, benchmark analysis, paper analysis, and research-to-practice translation.
business_value: Ensures research agents translate cutting-edge research into practical product improvements.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): Research Intelligence, Research Practitioner
reporting_line.functional_peers: ELO-T2 Domain Leads (Innovation, AI/ML, Emerging Practices)

success_metrics: All research agents connected within 24 hours
